caption: A person's hands are shown interacting with a stack of cards and yellow sticky notes on a surface decorated with a tropical palm tree pattern. In the top-left frame, a hand holds a yellow sticky note near a white card box. By the top-right frame, the hand places the sticky note on top of the box. In the bottom-left frame, the person holds the yellow note while gripping a card. Finally, in the bottom-right frame, the person reveals a sports card from behind the sticky note. Throughout the sequence, an inset video window in the bottom right shows a man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt sitting in a room with shelves of collectibles. On-screen graphics include the logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" appearing in the upper center and right areas of the frames.
